title: fix-first: re-render plugin skill trees for lock.mjs + manifest regen
action: msh-1 added templates/lib/lock.mjs but the committed rendered plugin trees (.claude-plugin/skills, .codex-plugin/skills) were never re-rendered — test_plugin_distribution fails 2 checks (lock.mjs missing from both trees). Same class as cnt-7 post-guard-edit regen (d435374) and the 20260715 manifest pattern, now at the render layer. Run node scripts/render_plugin_skill_trees.mjs, then node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --write, prove node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_plugin_distribution.mjs green (40/40) and --check green, commit ONLY the re-rendered trees + manifest with [msh-8].

trace.outcome: Plugin skill trees re-rendered to include lock.mjs; manifest regenerated; all 40 distribution checks + manifest verification pass
trace.verify_output: plugin_distribution: 40 passed, 0 failed; release_manifest --check: 366 file(s) match stored manifest
